methodology: Refactored to Empowered-style OKRs: a small set of company objectives, linked source objectives, source-level key results, explicit team ownership, and limited use of High Integrity Commitments.
description: Preparation Objectives for the next quarter.
okrDesignPrinciples: Objectives describe meaningful business and customer outcomes, not feature delivery.
Key results measure source objectives, while source objectives map upward into a small set of company objectives.
Every key result names executing and supporting teams so accountability is explicit.
High Integrity Commitments are used sparingly and only for work that is materially deadline-sensitive.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q2 Make execution reliably repeatable
companyObjectives.statement: Improve the operating system behind the product so launches, service recovery, reliability, and cross-functional delivery become predictably repeatable.
companyObjectives.okrDesignNotes: Keeps teams accountable for operational outcomes and avoids turning roadmap delivery into a checklist of feature shipments.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q2 Turn product progress into economic leverage
companyObjectives.statement: Translate better customer and operational outcomes into stronger revenue quality, retention, and strategic leverage for the business.
companyObjectives.okrDesignNotes: Separates commercial results from activity metrics so leaders can evaluate whether product work is compounding into business value.

objectives.title: 2026-Q2 Individual Seller / Landlord outcome goal
objectives.objective: Prepare to improve Estimation-to-listing conversion for Individual Seller / Landlord by advancing strengthen owner acquisition funnels, valuation credibility, and self-serve listing basics. through owner intent capture and listing reliability.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Difference between realized economics and the owner's realistic market target after fees, vacancy, and concessions.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Revenue generated from owners through listing products, supply lead monetization, and related services.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase Net proceeds / yield realization during the quarter.

executingTeams.intent: Lead the work to improve net proceeds / yield realization via Estimation Funnel and FSBO Online Classifieds Acquisition.

supportingTeams.teamName: Market Intelligence & Pricing - Property Valuation Tool
supportingTeams.intent: Support the KR by contributing capability for net proceeds / yield realization, aligned with its focus on own valuations, pricing intelligence, analytics, data platform, and geo/location capabilities. This team specifically focuses on property valuation tool via Property Valuation Tool and Data Foundation.

Support the KR by contributing capability for net proceeds / yield realization, aligned with its focus on provide frontend shell, identity, user management, shared services, and engineering platform capabilities. This team specifically focuses on frontend via Unified Frontend and Cookie Consent Management.

Support the KR by contributing capability for net proceeds / yield realization, aligned with its focus on own owner acquisition, valuation, funnel conversion, and owner self-service monetization workflows. This team specifically focuses on owner coaching via Owner Coaching Experience and Owner Property Management.

keyResults.commitmentRationale: This KR should be pursued as an outcome target with room for discovery, iteration, and tradeoff.

target1.label: 2026-Q3 target
target1.projectedValue: Current estimate: Net proceeds / yield realization moves far enough to show clear momentum toward improve quarter over quarter, driven by increase Net proceeds / yield realization during the quarter.

target2.label: 2026-year-end target
target2.projectedValue: Current estimate: Net proceeds / yield realization ends the horizon sustainably ahead of today's baseline, with improve quarter over quarter holding across the broader operating model.
